Hily: Meet, Chat and Date for Real!

Date as you are on Hily and have a blast doing it! Meet singles, flirt online and build real connections — dating apps work best when you stay you. Hily is one of the best dating apps for people ready to chat and date, their own style.

Millions of people worldwide chat and date on Hily. Join them and start exploring and connecting! No matter if you’re here for romantic dating or just meeting new people, maybe you will discover someone (or something about yourself) that will make it click. Hily’s part of a new wave of free dating apps, built for real life, from local dating adventures to international dating connections that broaden your world.

How Hily Works
Easy! Make a dating profile that really shows who you are — then explore and meet singles who match your energy.
Not sure where to start? Well, the best part of online dating is the discovery, and Hily's got tools built for exactly that. Take the Icks & Clicks compatibility quiz to show what you truly want, explore zodiac matches for fun self-insight or use personalized icebreakers to chat and date without awkwardness.
Looking for a date, a relationship or just a really good conversation? The Hily dating app connects you with real people near you and around the world. Here’s where it all starts!
Why People Love Hily
Dating apps should be inspiring, not exhausting. And Hily makes it fun to meet singles who vibe with you. From the first like to the first date, you're in one of the most exciting free dating apps out there.

Here’s what you get inside the Hily dating app:
- Icks & Clicks Compatibility Quiz — match based on real chemistry and turn it into local dating sparks or international dating adventures
- Zodiac Compatibility— a different look at who you are and who you click with. Maybe you will find that the stars were pointing somewhere interesting all along
- Safety Center — tools and guidance for safe and confident online dating on one of today’s most trusted free dating apps
- Consent Guard — automatically keep your DMs safe from unpleasant surprises. A unique feature among free dating apps
- Verified Photos — meet people who are 100% real
- Personalized Icebreakers — flirt with confidence and start conversations without awkwardness

Find Your Match Anywhere
From local dating to international dating, Hily opens the door to millions of singles ready to flirt, explore and connect. This is what free dating apps should feel like. Maybe you will find the one who truly matches your energy — and maybe you will find that the process itself is half the fun.

Safe, Inclusive & Real
Your safety comes first. Whether you’re using free dating features or Premium, Hily dating app makes sure every online dating experience stays secure and in your control. Hily offers:
- Photo verification
- Privacy controls for your location
- Report and block tools to stay in charge
- Smart detection of inappropriate content
- Consent Guard

Premium or Free — Your Choice
Use Hily as a free dating app to match, chat and explore without limits, or upgrade to Premium for exclusive perks:
- See who liked you first
- Boost your visibility to get more matches
- Undo your last skip
- Go incognito and stay private

Whichever you choose, Hily stands among the best dating apps for casual dating or deep connections.

Join Millions of Singles
Dating is more than clicking through profiles. Dating is an adventure. On Hily, you can chat, flirt and meet singles close by through local dating, or connect globally via international dating. Hily is one of the best dating apps for anyone ready for something real.

We’re redefining online dating for a new generation: self-aware, open-minded and real. Maybe you will meet someone who feels just right, and maybe you will discover more about yourself along the way.

So if you’re ready to meet, chat and date, download Hily today! Your dating adventure is waiting.
